title: Event Payload Schema
description: Canonical event payload for progress tracking (Draft 2020-12). Includes the FR-1 canonical progressPct=100 emission rule, ordering guarantee, and authority as the terminal completion signal.

progressPct.description: Optional progress percentage: 0 to 100. progressPct=100 is the authoritative TERMINAL signal of job/task completion for progress-stream consumers. Emission rule: at most once per job/task, emitted ONLY after all processing steps complete and no further progress updates follow. No ordering guarantee for intermediate values; check progressPct==100 and status==completed together to confirm terminal completion.
